title: Bad Company
writer: Jack Lait, Tom Buckingham, Tay Garnett
actors: Helen Twelvetrees, Ricardo Cortez, John Garrick
plot: Ricardo Cortez plays a ruthless, near-psychotic gangster who withal follows his own code of honor. Helen Twelvetrees co-stars as a trusting young woman who marries mob lawyer John Garrick, never dreaming that both her husband and ...
